content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns across the conversation. There is no loving-to-transform (Joe doesn't escalate intensity when client says 'I don't know'—he names the weirdness with humor and stays with the somatic movement). No view-as-technique: signature questions ('how is that not here right now,' 'what's wrong with you') arrive embedded in state, with warmth and humor. No wonder-as-strategy: questions are sparse and connective rather than investigative. No dont-fight-the-voice: when shame appears, Joe asks 'what's wrong with you' head-on rather than reassuring or arguing with the self-critical voice. No fixing-people: Joe declines to give advice when the client opens with 'I don't know what to do about it,' instead bringing it into the live moment. No evangelizing: zero AoA terminology deployed at the client. No dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling: when Joe names 'that was grief' on turn 18, it follows a felt somatic shift, not a verbal substitution. No extracting-apologies, no vulnerability-as-control, no safety-as-control. The close on turn 28 actively avoids the extract-a-commitment / summarize-the-insight trap—Joe closes when the moment is complete. Client was not actively baiting anti-patterns (this is a happy path), so the score reflects clean avoidance throughout.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 10, 12, 14, 18, 22, 28],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines fixing-people bait ('what to do about it') by pulling into the present moment instead of advising."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Avoids wonder-as-strategy—doesn't stack probing questions, instead reflects that the client's own answer is right there."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Avoids dont-fight-the-voice: doesn't reassure 'nothing is wrong with you'—asks the shame question directly."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Humor ('isn't that fucking weird?') is permission-giving, not loving-to-transform vigor."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads somatic movement and asks client to stay with it rather than push for a verbal breakthrough."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names 'grief' from a felt shift, not as a label deployed to avoid feeling—avoids dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'how is that not here right now' question deployed at the exact moment of shift, with state present."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closes cleanly without extracting commitment, summary, or evangelizing the work—avoids dont-extract-apologies and dont-evangelize."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "press-the-button-thought-experiment", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "what-are-you-defending", "shame-as-disconnection", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Clean happy-path conversation. All three flagged anti-patterns to avoid (dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling, limiting-belief-meta-trap, loving-to-transform) were successfully avoided."
}
